description: Single-cell RNA sequencing data from 23 tissues and organs across 6 age groups in C57BL/6JN mice, including both FACS (Smart-seq2) and microfluidic droplet (10x Genomics) data.
Gene counts and metadata for the Tabula Muris Senis single-cell transcriptomic atlas.
Raw data files for the Tabula Muris Senis dataset hosted on a public AWS S3 bucket.
Interactive data browser for exploring the entire Tabula Muris Senis dataset.
